item.name: Gloria Ignition Key
item.description: This ignition key winds the gears of the Gloria-class airship. Remember to keep your balance.

mount.name: Gloria-class Airship
mount.action: Summon forth the Gloria-class airship. This single-occupancy airship is a singular feat of engineering.
mount.description: Taking inspiration from the half-remembered dream of his grandfather Tatanora, Tataramu used his encyclopedic knowledge to design a small-scale version of a rotary-winged airship. Its name derives from an airship that appears in an obscure novel of unknown origins.
mount.tooltip:
No, it must be one made to
extremely exacting specifications.
- Tataramu
